title: Amaxiu 20 Pcs Christmas Pull Bows, 5 Inch Gift Bows With Ribbon Green Large Bows for Gifts Gift Wrapping Supplies Present Bow Gift Bow for Christmas Decor Xmas Wedding Gift Baskets Gift Box(Green)
features: 【What You Will Get】You will receive 20 pieces of gift pull bows, sufficient in quantity and complete in combination to meet your gift wrapping needs. These Christmas bows and gift wrapping supplies are suitable for gift bag wrapping, gift box wrapping, gift basket wrapping, bouquet packaging, Christmas present decor, and more.

【Convenient Assembly】Each Christmas bows for gift wrapping consists of 8 pcs bow parts and the connection is fixed with plastic rings to prevent the traction rope from winding and knotting. You just need to find the 2 ribbons between the tails, and then gently pull the ribbon towards you, to push the bow away from you, to get the beautiful 5 in/13cm bow, finally you can tie the 2 ribbons to fix the shape of the butterfly knot.

【Large Pull Bows】These present warping bows in 2 different color, the design is based on Merry Christmas, red & green color. The pull-up size is 12 x 20 cm(4.72 x 7.87 inch), is big enough to attach to the gift box. Large bows for gift wrapping are perfect for gift box packaging, flower packaging and decoration, wedding table ornament, and Christmas decorations, you can also use them to decorate your party, wedding ceremony, scrapbooking, or use your imagination.

【Metallic Bright Coating Design】Our gift large bows are designed in classic Christmas colors, the colors of red and green are pure and charming, they are made of superior PP plastic material and coated with a metallic bright coating on the surface. which can ensure that the bows are durable and not easily broken, while also being waterproof and fade-resistant. They can be used to decorate your Christmas tree, car, wine bottles, baskets and gift boxes, adding a rich festive atmosphere.

【Multiple Use of Gift Bows】These lovely Christmas bows with vivid colors are great for decorating Xmas gifts, Christmas trees, wine bottles, gift baskets, florists, hampers, parties and other decors. Our Christmas Ribbon Bows are for many occasions such as Birthday Parties, Wedding, Valentine's Day, Halloween, Christmas, New Year Party Ornament, Graduations, weddings, Anniversaries, Retirement Parties, Family Reunions, Hawaiian Parties, or any other moments of special significance!
